nasb.text: Recently My people have arisen as an enemy— You strip the robe off the garment From unsuspecting passers-by, From those returned from war.

esv.text: But lately my people have risen up as an enemy; you strip the rich robe from those who pass by trustingly with no thought of war.

cnv.text: 你們卻像仇敵一樣，起來攻擊我的子民； 你們竟從安詳過路的人身上剝去衣服， 從不願作戰的人身上剝去外衣。

ccb.text: 近来，你们像仇敌一样起来攻击我的子民。 你们剥去那些如从战场归来一样毫无戒备的过路人的外衣。
